texto: Settings are obviously important - and as a writer, you have to respect what was real at the time of the story you're writing. But the real key to success lies in finding the right characters to carry that story.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Joan Lingard sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Settings are obviously important - and as a writer, you have to respect what was real at the time…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, success, time, útil em momentos de time e writing.

texto: Life is limited, but by writing, and reading, we can live in different worlds, get inside the skins and minds of other people, and, in this way, push out the boundaries of our own lifes.
explicacao: Citação de Joan Lingard sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is limited, but by writing, and reading, we can live in different worlds, get inside the ski…” articula reflexao, reading, limited em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
